summary: Win/Lose streak indicator feature testing completed. Backend correctly returns win_streak and lose_streak per photo. Frontend displays 🔥 fire icon for win streaks and 🛡️ shield for lose streaks. All 10 backend tests pass. UI verification shows streak badges on photo cards in BotDifficultySelector.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - featured replays endpoint not implemented

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Backend /battle-photos endpoint returns win_streak, lose_streak, current_win_streak, current_lose_streak for each photo
VERIFIED: /record-round-result endpoint updates streak data correctly - win resets lose_streak to 0 and vice versa
VERIFIED: BotDifficultySelector.jsx PhotoCard component displays StreakBadge (🔥/🛡️) at top-right of photo cards
VERIFIED: BotDifficultySelector.jsx shows fire icon with multiplier when winStreak >= 3 (e.g., 🔥3 ×1.25)
VERIFIED: BotDifficultySelector.jsx shows dimmed fire icon for winStreak 1-2 (e.g., 🔥1)
VERIFIED: BotDifficultySelector.jsx shows shield immunity badge when loseStreak >= 3
VERIFIED: TappingArena.jsx displays StreakIndicator in header for both player and opponent (lines 574-593)
VERIFIED: RPSBidding.jsx displays StreakIndicator below player and opponent photos (lines 658-666, 707-715)
VERIFIED: BattleArena.jsx initializes playerStats from photo data and computes effectivePlayerStats via useMemo
VERIFIED: StreakIndicator.jsx component renders animated fire (🔥) and shield (🛡️) badges with proper styling
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with minted photos
context_for_next_testing_agent: Streak indicators are fully functional. Test user has photos with various streak values. Mountain Lake photo has win_streak=1. The fire icon shows for any win streak > 0, but the multiplier badge only shows when win_streak >= 3. Shield immunity badge shows when lose_streak >= 3.

mocked_apis.none: All APIs are real backend implementations
